build.description: Build the libretether-relay relay (release) to deploy on a public cloud host for relay mode

check.description: Format-check and lint just this crate

dev.description: Run the relay from source (pass subcommands directly, e.g. `run relay:dev run` / `run relay:dev info`)

docker:build.description: Build the libretether-relay Docker image locally (context is the workspace root; published to ghcr.io/<owner>/libretether-relay on release)
